name: Skyflow
description: Data privacy vault delivered as an API for PII, payments, and LLM data protection.

seo.title: Skyflow — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Skyflow: Data privacy vault delivered as an API for PII, payments, and LLM data protection.

when_to_use: PII data vault for storing and tokenizing payment credentials
Privacy-preserving data access for LLM applications
PCI-compliant card data storage with field-level access control

pros: Purpose-built data privacy vault as an API
Covers payments, PII, and LLM data
Strong compliance posture with residency options
cons: Vault only — no routing or acquiring
Pricing scales quickly with records and APIs
Adds a hop to every sensitive-data flow
Overkill if PSP-provided vault already suffices
review.verdict: Top-tier data-privacy vault, especially for multi-data-type programs; not a replacement for payment orchestration.
review.best_for: Companies needing one vault for cards, PII, and LLM data with strict residency and governance.
review.not_for: Teams whose only need is basic PCI-scope reduction around a single PSP.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
